## Summary

Wires the Revise Card Contract into the Workbench queue and Revision Cockpit so the live queue only shows cards that are ready for actual copy-and-paste revision work.

This PR is the integration layer after PR #848. It does not apply manuscript patches. It only classifies, routes, and renders revise-card readiness.

## Product rule

A live Revise Queue card must have:

1. an exact source passage;
2. an exact source location;
3. a revision operation;
4. A/B/C candidate text that is copy-and-paste ready;
5. no lazy meta-suggestion text pretending to be a rewrite.

Cards that fail this contract must be routed to Needs Targeting, not displayed as usable Revise cards.

## In scope

- Import the Revise Card Contract into the Workbench queue path.
- Compute `revisionOperation` for each opportunity.
- Classify each opportunity as `ready_for_revise` or `needs_targeting`.
- Exclude `needs_targeting` cards from the live `opportunities` array.
- Expose `needsTargeting` and `readinessTotals` to the cockpit.
- Show Ready / Needs Targeting counts.
- Show a Needs Targeting sidebar section with the reason each card was withheld.
- Render operation-specific labels from `operationLabels`.
- Render operation-aware custom labels from `customOperationLabels`.
- Add Copy buttons that copy candidate text only.
- Disable unusable A/B/C controls when candidate text is not copy-ready.
- Keep focused tests passing.

## Explicitly out of scope

- no patch application
- no manuscript versioning
- no destructive writes
- no source-hash conflict detection
- no preview/apply lifecycle
- no TrustedPath changes
- no prompt changes
- no evaluation pipeline changes

PR #850 will handle preview/apply/versioning/conflict detection.
PR #851 will handle E2E proof.

## Required guardrail before merge

Legacy diagnostic prose, rationale text, repair-plan instructions, and fallback suggestions must not be promoted into A/B/C candidate text merely because they are longer than five words.

If an opportunity does not contain true copy-and-paste candidate prose for A/B/C, it must remain `needs_targeting`.

## Tests

Focused tests expected before merge:

```bash
npm test -- --runInBand \
  __tests__/lib/revision/reviseCardContract.test.ts \
  __tests__/lib/revision/workbenchQueue.test.ts \
  tests/components/ReviseQueueV2Client.smoke.test.tsx
```

## Acceptance criteria

- Ready cards appear in the live Revise Queue.
- Non-ready cards appear only in Needs Targeting.
- `No excerpt available` cards do not enter the live queue.
- `Location pending` cards do not enter the live queue.
- Meta-suggestion A/B/C text does not enter the live queue.
- Operation labels render in the cockpit.
- Copy buttons copy only candidate text.
- Accept buttons cannot accept non-copy-ready candidates.
- PR contains no patch-apply behavior.
- PR contains no manuscript versioning behavior.
